scrape.description:
“Your Private Escape in Dubai’s Most Serene Oasis” Discover a genuine 4-bedroom resale villa in Palmiera at The Oasis by Emaar, offering refined luxury in a tranquil lagoon-front community. Designed with exceptional attention to detail, this villa blends elegant architecture, resort-style surroundings, and seamless access to Dubai’s top destinations - making it an ideal choice for both families and investors. Key Highlights
  • Genuine 4BR Resale Villa in the sought-after Palmiera community
  • Prime position directly near the lagoons & waterways
  • Luxury villas crafted by world-renowned architects and designers
  • Spacious layouts designed for elegance, comfort & natural light
  • Located in a private, fully integrated resort-style community by Emaar
  • High family-living value & exceptional investment potential
  • Fast access to D54 & E44, connecting you to Dubai’s key destinations
  • Limited inventory - high-demand luxury community with fast growth
Features & Amenities
  • Crystal-clear Swimming Pools
  • Fully equipped Gymnasium
  • Scenic Lagoons & Water Attractions
  • Private Beach-Inspired Areas
  • Outdoor BBQ Zones
  • Retail & Dining Outlets
  • Landscaped Green Gardens
  • Jogging & Cycling Tracks
  • Family-friendly parks and recreational spaces
Nearby Locations
  • 10 Minutes – Sheikh Zayed Road
  • 15 Minutes – Dubai International Airport
  • 20 Minutes – The Dubai Mall
  • 20 Minutes – Burj Khalifa
  • 20 Minutes – Dubai Creek Harbour
  • 20 Minutes – Downtown Dubai
Your Perfect Investment & Lifestyle UpgradeA residence that elevates every day - whether you're a family seeking serenity or an investor eyeing long-term value, this Palmiera 4BR resale villa is a rare opportunity in one of Dubai’s most iconic luxury communities. For inquiries & viewings, contact RealTree Properties - [redacted phone number]
scrape.listing_title: Rare 4BR Villa Resale | Direct Main Lagoon | Best Corner Unit
